case_title: DARRYL MICKENS VS. AT SYSTEMS SECURITY, INC., AN ARIZONA CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF MICKENS, DARRYL AS TO DEFENDANT AT SYSTEMS SECURITY, INC., AN ARIZONA CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
